messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

errors.notAuthorized: You are not authorized to do that
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired — please sign in again
errors.noInlineTemplate: No inline template for this code. Open the official description:

haproxyPower.stopBody: This will stop the HAProxy process. All proxied connections will be dropped immediately and the proxy will be unreachable until you start it again.
haproxyPower.directNote: Direct mode has no supervisor — patchpanel cannot restart HAProxy from the UI.
haproxyPower.restartNote: Restart available via the Start menu item.
haproxyPower.reloadTitle: Zero-downtime reload via the master socket. Does NOT re-render the cfg from state.
haproxyPower.stopTooltip: Stop the HAProxy process. All connections dropped. Requires confirmation.
haproxyPower.directStartTitle: Direct strategy cannot start HAProxy — no supervisor configured.
haproxyPower.startTitle: Start the HAProxy process via the configured supervisor.

pending.title: {{label}} — click Apply to validate + reload HAProxy, or Discard to revert.

jsonEditor.idRequired: Entity must have a string `id` field
jsonEditor.hint: Edit the JSON shape directly. Server-side schema validation runs on save and the confirm-apply modal will show a section-level diff. Form-driven editors land in v0.2.32-rc3.

reorderTable.jumpTitle: Click to jump to a different {{label}}
reorderTable.savedOrderTooltip: Saved order — drag rows or use arrows to reorder. {{label}} #1 is evaluated first.
reorderTable.sortActiveTooltip: Sort is active — saved-order controls disabled. Click here to clear the sort and re-enable drag.
reorderTable.noRowsFiltered: No rows match the current filter.

tokenRef.uniqueIdMissing: unique-id-format is empty — HAProxy will emit an empty unique id.
tokenRef.captureNoConsumers: No frontend inherits this defaults block yet, so captures cannot exist anywhere.
tokenRef.captureOk: slot {{slot}} available on all {{count}} consumer frontend(s): {{names}}
tokenRef.varMissing: No set-var rule for var({{key}}) found on any consumer frontend. Add an http-request set-var action.
tokenRef.unknownDetail: Unrecognized token — may still be a valid HAProxy fetch we don't know about. Verify against HAProxy 4.2.
tokenRef.noTokens: No <0>%[token]</0> references found in the body.
tokenRef.referenceSummary: Reference: what configures each token kind

help.builtin: HAProxy sample fetches (<0>%[src]</0>, <1>%[date]</1>, <2>%[hdr(NAME)]</2>, <3>%[ssl_fc_*]</3>, <4>%[path]</4>, <5>%[method]</5>, <6>%[status]</6>, …). No setup required.
help.global: <0>%[unique-id]</0> requires <1>unique-id-format</1> set in <2>Global Settings</2>. patchpanel defaults to the canonical hex format.
help.perFrontend: <0>%[capture.req.hdr(N)]</0> / <1>%[capture.res.hdr(N)]</1> require <2>captureRequestHeaders[]</2> / <3>captureResponseHeaders[]</3> on each frontend that inherits this defaults block — slot index is 0-based and matches the entry order in the capture array. Edit on <4>Frontends → HTTP options → Capture</4>.
help.rule: <0>%[var(SCOPE.NAME)]</0> requires an <1>http-request set-var</1> rule on a consumer frontend with the same scope + name, fired before the response. Edit on <2>Rules</2>.

apiDocs.noTokens: No API tokens minted yet. Use the Generate Temp Token button below for testing, or mint a long-lived token from Profile → API tokens.
apiDocs.hint: patchpanel stores token secrets bcrypt-hashed — existing token plaintexts cannot be retrieved. Use Generate Temp Token below to test.
apiDocs.tempLabel: Generate a temporary token (expires after {{hours}}h) and fill the Bearer field automatically.
apiDocs.bearerNotFound: Could not find the bearer auth input — open the Authorize modal again and retry.
